data.title: OBOOK Holdings’ OwlTing Secures US$10 Million Convertible Financing, Opens Path to US$50 Million Facility
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

OBOOK Holdings, Inc. Class A ( (OWLS) ) has issued an update.

On April 2, 2026, OBOOK Holdings Inc. entered into a securities purchase agreement with Lind Global Asset Management XV LLC for a zero-interest senior secured convertible note with a US$11.5 million face value and associated warrants, delivering US$10 million in initial gross proceeds. The 18‑month note, convertible at US$9.00 per share with additional VWAP‑linked monthly conversion mechanics and a one‑time buyback right, is secured against substantially all company and certain subsidiary assets, with a resale registration filing required within 45 days of closing.

A related April 3, 2026 press release under the OwlTing brand detailed that the facility could scale to US$50 million, including up to US$40 million in follow‑on investments on similar terms, subject to mutual consent. Management plans to use the funds for global expansion of OwlPay’s payment infrastructure, regulatory licensing, strategic acquisitions and working capital, a move that strengthens the company’s balance sheet for scaling its multi‑billion‑dollar transaction pipeline while employing shareholder‑protective features such as a 120‑day conversion moratorium and contractual limits on short‑selling and securities lending by the investor.

The most recent analyst rating on (OWLS) stock is a Hold with a $5.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on OBOOK Holdings, Inc. Class A stock, see the OWLS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on OWLS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, OWLS is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by very weak financial performance—large losses, accelerating cash burn, negative equity, and rising debt. Technical indicators also reflect bearish momentum with the stock trading below key moving averages. Valuation is neutral due to missing P/E and dividend data.

To see Spark’s full report on OWLS stock, click here.

More about OBOOK Holdings, Inc. Class A

OwlTing Group, the operating brand of Taiwan-founded OBOOK Holdings Inc., is a global fintech company with subsidiaries across the United States, Japan, Poland, Singapore, Hong Kong, Thailand and Malaysia. It runs a diversified ecosystem spanning payments, hospitality and e-commerce, and in 2025 was ranked among the top two global “Enterprise & B2B” digital currency players by CB Insights, driven by its OwlPay hybrid Web2/Web3 payment platform and distributed-ledger-based solutions.

The company focuses on using distributed ledger technology to provide transparent data management and to reinvent cross-border fund flows for businesses and consumers. OwlPay underpins this strategy by enabling global enterprises to operate in the expanding digital currency economy while navigating regulatory regimes, supported by a growing base of money transmission licenses and integrations such as Visa Direct.

Average Trading Volume: 32,576

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $513.5M

data.title: Westlake Boosts Liquidity with New $1.5 Billion Credit Facility
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Westlake Corporation ( (WLK) ).

On April 2, 2026, Westlake Corporation entered into a new unsecured revolving credit agreement providing up to $1.5 billion in borrowing capacity, replacing an existing facility of the same size that was terminated that day without costs or penalties. The new facility, which matures on April 2, 2031, features pricing tied to Westlake’s credit ratings, includes a $150 million letter-of-credit sub-limit, a $50 million swingline loan commitment and an option to upsize the facility by up to $500 million, reinforcing the company’s financial flexibility and liquidity profile through customary covenants and leverage tests.

Any borrowings under the facility will accrue interest at either a Term SOFR-based rate plus a spread of 1.000% to 1.625% or an ABR-based rate plus a spread of 0.000% to 0.625%, with an undrawn commitment fee of 0.090% to 0.200%, all varying with Westlake’s credit rating. The agreement also includes standard events of default provisions that allow lenders to accelerate repayment and terminate commitments if certain conditions are breached, underscoring the importance for Westlake of maintaining its leverage metrics and credit profile over the life of the facility.

The most recent analyst rating on (WLK) stock is a Hold with a $115.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Westlake Corporation stock, see the WLK Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WLK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WLK is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by deteriorated TTM fundamentals (losses, compressed margins, and negative free cash flow), partially offset by a solid balance sheet. Technicals are supportive with strong trend/momentum, and the earnings call adds a measured positive via clear 2026 improvement guidance, but valuation support is limited while earnings remain negative.

To see Spark’s full report on WLK stock, click here.

More about Westlake Corporation

Westlake Corporation is a global manufacturer in the chemicals and materials industry, producing a range of petrochemicals, polymers and building products that serve construction, packaging and industrial end markets. The company relies on large-scale capital markets and bank facilities to support its working capital, refinancing needs and broader corporate liquidity management.

Average Trading Volume: 1,410,513

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $15.27B

For an in-depth examination of WLK stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Integral Corporation ( (JP:5842) ) has issued an announcement.

Integral Corporation, a Tokyo Stock Exchange Growth Market-listed investment firm, manages the Fund III Series comprising Integral 3 Limited Partnership and Innovation Alpha L.P. The funds have executed nine investments and eight exits since 2017, surpassing their 8% hurdle rate and enabling Integral to earn 20% of cumulative profits as carried interest, excluding portions attributable to its directors and employees.

Following an additional partial exit through the sale of a portion of its holdings, Integral expects to receive further carried interest distributions from the Fund III Series. The company estimates that, combined with previously disclosed amounts, this will lift revenue by about JPY 6.3 billion, profit before income taxes by about JPY 5.9 billion, and profit for the year by about JPY 4.1 billion for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2026, and it will continue to disclose unrealized carried interest in quarterly presentations.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:5842) stock is a Hold with a Yen3266.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Integral Corporation stock, see the JP:5842 Stock Forecast page.

More about Integral Corporation

Integral Corporation is a Japanese investment firm listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Growth Market under securities code 5842. The company manages private equity funds, including Integral 3 Limited Partnership and Innovation Alpha L.P., focusing on portfolio investments, exits, and carried interest income from its fund management activities.

data.description:

Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Co. Ltd. ( (IN:CHOLAFIN) ) has provided an announcement.

Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Company Limited has scheduled a meeting of its Board of Directors on April 30, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and full year ended March 31, 2026. This meeting will be closely watched by investors as it will provide a detailed view of the company’s financial performance for the fiscal year.

In line with securities regulations on insider trading, the company has closed its trading window for designated persons from April 1 to May 2, 2026, covering the period around the preparation and announcement of these results. The closure aims to prevent any potential misuse of unpublished price-sensitive information and signals the imminent release of key financial disclosures to the market.

More about Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Co. Ltd.

Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Company Limited is a non-banking financial company operating in India, focusing on lending and investment services. Its business typically spans vehicle finance, home loans, and other retail and corporate funding solutions, serving a broad base of borrowers across urban and semi-urban markets.

data.title: Daiichi Kigenso Denies Rumors of Production Halt at Vietnamese Affiliate
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Daiichi Kigenso Kagaku-Kogyo Co.,Ltd ( (JP:4082) ).

Daiichi Kigenso Kagaku-Kogyo has rejected online rumors circulating on Yahoo! Japan Finance that its Vietnamese production affiliate halted operations due to energy shortages and that this information originated from its public relations department. The company stressed that the Vietnamese plant is operating normally and that no such communication was made externally by its PR team.

Management emphasized that any important corporate information will continue to be disclosed accurately and in a timely manner only through official announcements, statutory disclosure materials, and its website. By formally correcting the misinformation, the company aims to reassure stakeholders about the stability of its overseas operations and protect the integrity of its market communications.

The Vietnamese affiliate, Vietnam Rare Elements Chemical Joint Stock Company, operates in an industrial park in Ho Chi Minh City and is engaged in the production and sale of zirconium oxychloride. This facility forms part of Daiichi Kigenso Kagaku-Kogyo’s broader rare elements chemicals business, underlining the importance of clear and reliable disclosure around its operating status.

More about Daiichi Kigenso Kagaku-Kogyo Co.,Ltd

Daiichi Kigenso Kagaku-Kogyo Co., Ltd. is a Japan-based chemical manufacturer listed on the Prime Market of the Tokyo Stock Exchange under securities code 4082. Through its Vietnamese affiliate, Vietnam Rare Elements Chemical Joint Stock Company, the group produces and sells zirconium oxychloride from a facility in the Phu My 3 Specialized Industrial Park near Ho Chi Minh City, serving industrial customers that rely on rare element chemical materials.

Average Trading Volume: 2,159,437

Current Market Cap: Yen50.57B

data.title: SBI Holdings Cedes Control of Korean Savings Bank but Retains Strong Economic Stake
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

SBI Holdings ( (JP:8473) ) has issued an announcement.

SBI Holdings has completed the sale of a majority stake in its South Korean unit, SBI Savings Bank, to Kyobo Life Insurance, transferring 156,147,223 shares for a total consideration of KRW 900 billion. Following the transaction, SBI’s voting rights in the bank fall from 100% to 41.34%, and SBI Savings Bank is reclassified from a consolidated subsidiary to an equity-method affiliate.

Despite the loss of majority voting control, SBI will retain a 70% economic interest in SBI Savings Bank under its agreement with Kyobo Life, limiting the expected impact on consolidated financial results. The company anticipates recognizing a gain on the sale of shares, which will strengthen earnings, and has indicated that any material details regarding the gain will be disclosed once the amount is finalized.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:8473) stock is a Buy with a Yen3229.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SBI Holdings stock, see the JP:8473 Stock Forecast page.

More about SBI Holdings

SBI Holdings, Inc., listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, is a Japanese financial services group with a strong presence in banking, securities, and related businesses across Asia. Through its subsidiaries, including operations in South Korea, the group focuses on deposit-taking, lending, and other financial services aimed at retail and corporate clients in regional markets.

YTD Price Performance: -10.40%

data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Japaniace Co., Ltd. ( (JP:9558) ).

Japaniace Co., Ltd. reported first-quarter fiscal 2026 non-consolidated results showing net sales of ¥3,158 million, up 11.4% year on year, with operating profit rising 10.4% to ¥244 million and net profit increasing 11.5% to ¥170 million, underscoring steady earnings growth. Despite a slight decline in shareholders’ equity ratio to 57.6% and marginally lower net assets, basic earnings per share climbed to ¥43.10, signaling improved profitability.

The company maintained its dividend stance, paying a total of ¥99 per share in the prior fiscal year and forecasting a modest increase to ¥101 for the year ending November 30, 2026, reflecting confidence in cash flow generation. Full-year guidance remains unchanged, with net sales projected to rise 8.8% to ¥13,150 million and net profit expected to grow 2.6% to ¥785 million, suggesting continued but moderating expansion that may reassure investors seeking stable, incremental growth rather than aggressive risk-taking.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9558) stock is a Buy with a Yen2269.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Japaniace Co., Ltd. stock, see the JP:9558 Stock Forecast page.

More about Japaniace Co., Ltd.

Japaniace Co., Ltd. is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Growth Market and operates under Japanese GAAP, though the specific industry and product lineup are not detailed in the release. The company targets stable earnings and shareholder returns, as reflected in its consistent dividend policy and earnings guidance for the fiscal year ending November 30, 2026.

data.title: Tokai Corp. Lifts Full-Year Earnings Forecast on Strong Rental and Healthcare Demand
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Tokai ( (JP:9729) ) has issued an update.

Tokai Corp. has raised its consolidated earnings forecast for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026, citing stronger-than-expected performance across several core operations. The company now expects net sales of ¥159.6 billion, up 1.1% from its previous forecast, with operating profit projected to rise 13.6% and ordinary profit 16.6%, while profit attributable to owners of parent is seen 10.2% higher than earlier guidance.

Management attributes the upgrade to steady growth in its core rental business, higher prescription unit prices at dispensing pharmacies driven by increased use of high-cost drugs, and robust bedding and linen supply demand on the back of strong hotel occupancy and price revisions. Profitability is further supported by cost reductions from more efficient management of rental materials in the elderly care equipment business, partially offset by expected impairment losses on land at the Saitama Plant and certain pharmacy stores, suggesting resilient underlying operations despite one-off charges.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9729) stock is a Buy with a Yen2797.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tokai stock, see the JP:9729 Stock Forecast page.

More about Tokai

Tokai Corp., listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market, operates a diversified service portfolio centered on a core rental business, dispensing pharmacy operations, and bedding and linen supply services. The company also runs an elderly care equipment rental segment and serves institutional clients such as hotels and care facilities, making it sensitive to healthcare demand, occupancy trends, and service pricing dynamics in Japan.

YTD Price Performance: 2.12%

Average Trading Volume: 41,061

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen81.87B
